howItWorks.subtitle:
Real Expert Knowledge via
AI Avatars
howItWorks.description:
Hit a roadblock?
Connect with AI avatars powered by the insights of real mentors and professional trainers.
They help you break down the issue and identify what to do next — like a coach, always ready.

section4.title:
NEVER MISS
A TASK AGAIN
section4.subtitle:
AI-Powered Tracking
& Smart Reminders
section4.description: AI Mentor connects with Gmail, Slack, Calendar, Notion, and GitHub to detect missed or unfinished tasks. It reminds the right person at the right time so nothing falls through the cracks.

section5.title:

WITHOUT

PING
section5.subtitle: Two Click AI Follow ups
section5.description:
Need someone to take action? AI Mentor drafts follow-up messages for you.
Send them via Slack or email with just two clicks
— no pressure, no micromanaging.

section6.title:
TURN YOUR GOALS
INTO
REAL MOMENTUM
section6.subtitle:
AI-Guided
Milestone Planning
section6.description:
Overwhelmed by your to-do list?
AI Mentor transforms your goals into clear milestones with measurable targets and daily
actions.
It brings structure, consistency, and confidence to your day-to-day progress.
